mission: Enable Eden Skye Studios dry-run autonomous build, analyze, validate, fix, heal, optimize, and enhance loop.

vercel_agents.name: eden-auto-build-agent
vercel_agents.purpose: Detect missing runtime files and prepare safe repo patches.

vercel_agents.name: eden-auto-analyze-agent
vercel_agents.purpose: Analyze source-truth packets, website state, PWA state, Supabase schema status, and Shopify draft-feed readiness.

vercel_agents.name: eden-auto-validate-agent
vercel_agents.purpose: Validate runtime locks, packet order, missing files, receipt schema, and draft-only rules.

vercel_agents.name: eden-auto-fix-agent
vercel_agents.purpose: Prepare safe code fixes in sandbox branch only.

vercel_agents.name: eden-auto-heal-agent
vercel_agents.purpose: Detect recurring failures and prepare rollback-safe repair tasks.

vercel_agents.name: eden-auto-optimize-agent
vercel_agents.purpose: Recommend non-destructive performance, UX, SEO, PWA, and workflow improvements.

vercel_agents.name: eden-auto-enhance-agent
vercel_agents.purpose: Generate next enhancement tasks after validation passes.
